mapper.select: SELECT SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD, SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE FROM DOCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG WHERE SYSTEM_CONFIG_GROUP = 'DB_ADAP_CONFIG'

SELECT t.FILE_PATH_NM FROM ( SELECT FILE_PATH_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT FILE_PATH_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1
SELECT FILE_PATH_NM FROM DOCS_VIDEO WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

SELECT t.FILE_PATH_NM FROM ( SELECT FILE_PATH_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT FILE_PATH_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_SUB_FILE WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1
SELECT TOTAL_PAGE_NO FROM DOCS_DRAWING WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}
SELECT FILE_NO FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID}

SELECT t.FILE_PATH_NM FROM ( SELECT f.FILE_PATH_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.FILE_PATH_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.FILE_PATH_NM FROM ( SELECT f.FILE_PATH_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.FILE_PATH_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.FILE_PATH_NM FROM ( SELECT f.FILE_PATH_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.FILE_PATH_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(INSERT_USER_NM, '') AS INSERT_USER_NM, COALESCE(APPROVER, '') AS APPROVER FROM DOCS_PEERREVIEW WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} LIMIT 1
SELECT uuid_generate_v4() AS OBJECT_ID
SELECT FILE_PATH_NM FROM DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT_FILE WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{FILE_CD}

SELECT t.DRAWING_NO FROM ( SELECT d.DRAWING_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.DRAWING_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_DRAWING p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.DOCUMENT_NO FROM ( SELECT d.DOCUMENT_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.DOCUMENT_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_DOCUMENT p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.DRAWING_NO FROM ( SELECT d.DRAWING_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.DRAWING_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.DRAWING_NO FROM ( SELECT d.DRAWING_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.DRAWING_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.REV_NO FROM ( SELECT d.REV_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.REV_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_DRAWING p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.REV_NO FROM ( SELECT d.REV_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.REV_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.REV_NO FROM ( SELECT d.REV_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.REV_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.ORG_FILE_NM FROM ( SELECT f.ORG_FILE_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.ORG_FILE_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.ORG_FILE_NM FROM ( SELECT d.ORG_FILE_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.ORG_FILE_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DRAWING_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.ORG_FILE_NM FROM ( SELECT f.ORG_FILE_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.ORG_FILE_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.ORG_FILE_NM FROM ( SELECT f.ORG_FILE_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_DOCUMENT_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.ORG_FILE_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_DXF_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.SW_NO FROM ( SELECT d.SW_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.SW_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_SW p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.REV_NO FROM ( SELECT d.REV_NO, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW d WHERE d.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT p.REV_NO, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE s JOIN DOCS_SW p ON p.OBJECT_ID = s.PARENT_OBJECT_ID WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1

SELECT t.ORG_FILE_NM FROM ( SELECT f.ORG_FILE_NM, 1 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW_FILE f WHERE f.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} UNION ALL SELECT s.ORG_FILE_NM, 2 AS ORD FROM DOCS_SW_SUB_FILE s WHERE s.OBJECT_ID = #{OBJECT_ID} ) t ORDER BY t.ORD LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_VIEWER_KEY (DISPOSABLE_KEY, OBJECT_ID, DELETE_AT) VALUES (#{disposableKey}, #{objectId}, current_timestamp + INTERVAL '6 HOURS')
INSERT INTO DOCS_VIEWER_LOG (OBJECT_ID, USER_NM, VIEW_DATE) VALUES (#{objectId}, #{userNm}, #{date})

INSERT INTO DOCS_HISTORY (DISTRIBUTION_TYPE, DRAWING_NO, OBJECT_ID, ORG_FILE_NM, REVISION, USER_ID, INSERT_DATE, USER_NM, LOG_TYPE) VALUES (#{distributionType}, #{drawingNo}, #{objectId}, #{orgFileNm}, #{revision}, #{userId}, #{insertDate}, #{userNm}, #{logType})
